just keeping life ordinary
already takes everything you've got."

You used to think ordinary was boring.
Now you know ordinary is hard.

Waking up on time, eating properly,
not snapping at anyone —
that's already a small win for today.

Admitting you just want to be
an ordinary person
is nothing to be ashamed of.

It's not that you haven't tried hard enough.
It's that you've been trying hard
for a very long time.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who beats themselves up for not being 'successful enough' — just keeping ordinary life going is already an achievement
variations: Short: just keeping life ordinary already takes everything you've got
Advanced: it's not that you haven't tried hard enough — you've been trying hard for a very long time

items.sourceNote: 《Bon Appetit, Your Majesty》(2025)「想你因為餓還是餓因為想你」金句延伸，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
韓劇裡最會撩的一句：

「我是因為餓了才想你，
還是因為想你才覺得餓？」

反正每到吃飯時間，
第一個想到的就是你。

看到好吃的想分你一半，
吃到難吃的想叫你別來踩雷。

後來才發現，
我不是想吃飯，
是想跟你一起吃飯。

一個人的餐桌再豐盛，
都不如你坐在對面隨便聊兩句。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個你總想揪一起吃飯的人——所有的「吃飽沒」其實都是「我想你」
variations: 短版：我是因為餓了才想你，還是因為想你才覺得餓？
進階版：我不是想吃飯，是想跟你一起吃飯

en.content:
The smoothest line in any K-drama:

"Am I thinking of you because I'm hungry,
or am I hungry because I'm thinking of you?"

Either way, every time it's mealtime,
you're the first thing on my mind.

See something good, I want to share half with you.
Eat something bad, I want to warn you off it.

Turns out
I don't actually want to eat —
I want to eat with you.

The fanciest table set for one
still loses to you across from me,
talking about nothing.
en.editorNote: Send to the person you always want to grab a meal with — every 'have you eaten?' is secretly 'I miss you'
variations: Short: am I thinking of you because I'm hungry, or hungry because I'm thinking of you?
Advanced: I don't actually want to eat — I want to eat with you

items.sourceNote: 《When Life Gives You Tangerines》(2025)「愛的大小一樣，差的是溫度」金句延伸，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
韓劇這句，把愛說得太準了：

「愛的大小其實一樣，
不一樣的是溫度。」

有人愛你愛得很大聲，
有人愛你愛得很安靜。

有人把愛說成稱讚，
有人把愛藏進嘮叨。

小時候不懂，
以為唸你的人不愛你，
長大才知道，
那是最不會說好聽話的愛。

真正暖到你的，
不是說得多漂亮，
是那份剛剛好的溫度——
讓你可以安心做自己。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個被家人嘮叨長大、現在才慢慢讀懂的人——愛的大小一樣，差別只在表達的溫度
variations: 短版：愛的大小其實一樣，不一樣的是溫度
進階版：真正暖到你的，是那份剛剛好的溫度，讓你可以安心做自己

en.content:
This K-drama line nails what love really is:

"The size of the love was the same.
What differed was its temperature."

Some people love you loudly.
Some people love you quietly.

Some turn love into praise.
Some hide love inside nagging.

As a kid you didn't get it —
you thought the one scolding you
didn't love you.
Growing up, you learned
that was just love
with no talent for sweet words.

What actually warms you
isn't how beautifully it's said.
It's that just-right temperature —
the one that lets you be yourself.
en.editorNote: Send to someone raised on a parent's nagging who's only now learning to read it — the love was the same size, only the temperature differed
variations: Short: the size of the love was the same — what differed was its temperature
Advanced: what actually warms you is that just-right temperature, the one that lets you be yourself

items.sourceNote: 2026療癒韓劇「快樂只有自己能給」金句延伸，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
韓劇這句，建議貼在鏡子上：

「自己的快樂，
永遠只有自己能給，
別把幸福的決定權
交到別人手上。」

等別人來愛你才開心，
那你的開心就會一直缺貨。

等別人說你好，你才覺得好，
那你永遠在等一句不一定會來的話。

你可以喜歡有人陪，
但不要變成沒人陪就活不下去。

先把自己過得快樂，
別人來，是加分；
別人不來，你也已經很完整。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個習慣把開心寄託在別人身上的朋友——幸福的遙控器，要握在自己手裡
variations: 短版：別把幸福的決定權交到別人手上
進階版：別人來是加分，別人不來，你也已經很完整

en.content:
A K-drama line worth taping to your mirror:

"Your own happiness
can only ever come from you.
Don't hand the power
over your joy to someone else."

Wait for someone to love you before you're happy,
and your happiness stays out of stock.

Wait for someone to call you good
before you feel good,
and you're forever waiting on a line
that may never come.

You're allowed to enjoy company —
just don't become someone
who can't survive without it.

Build a happy life first.
When people show up, that's a bonus.
When they don't, you're already whole.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who tends to pin their happiness on other people — keep the remote control to your own joy in your own hand
variations: Short: don't hand the power over your joy to someone else
Advanced: when people show up that's a bonus — when they don't, you're already whole

items.sourceNote: 韓劇愛情金句「愛不是甜言蜜語，是一起撐過痛」延伸，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
韓劇這段，重新定義了什麼叫愛：

「愛不是天天甜言蜜語，
是難關來的時候，
你選擇留下，而不是逃走。」

熱戀時誰都會說好聽話，
那不算什麼。

真正的考驗，
是日子變難、人變累、
連笑都笑不太出來的時候，
你還願不願意伸手牽他。

會說「我愛你」的人很多，
願意在你最狼狽時
還站在你旁邊的，很少。

你要找的，是後面那種。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在猶豫一段關係值不值得的朋友——甜的時候誰都在，難的時候還在，才是真的
variations: 短版：愛不是甜言蜜語，是難關來時你選擇留下
進階版：會說我愛你的人很多，願意在你最狼狽時還站在旁邊的，很少

en.content:
This K-drama line redefines what love actually is:

"Love isn't whispering sweet nothings every day.
It's choosing to stay
when the hard part arrives —
instead of running."

Anyone can say pretty things
in the honeymoon phase.
That part is easy.

The real test
is when life gets heavy,
when you're both worn out,
when even smiling takes effort —
and they still reach for your hand.

Plenty of people will say 'I love you.'
Few will stand beside you
at your messiest.

Look for the second kind.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend weighing whether a relationship is worth it — anyone stays for the sweet part; staying through the hard part is the real thing
variations: Short: love isn't sweet nothings — it's choosing to stay when the hard part arrives
Advanced: plenty will say 'I love you'; few will stand beside you at your messiest

items.sourceNote: 《低谷醫生》治癒金句「現在不順又不會一輩子不順」延伸，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
《低谷醫生》這句，低潮的時候很需要：

「沒事的，
我們只是現在不順，
又不是一輩子都這樣。
抬頭挺胸，
好事很快就會來。」

人在谷底的時候，
最容易把「暫時」看成「永遠」。

但你低潮，不代表你失敗，
只代表你正在過一段比較難走的路。

路會轉彎，
季節會換，
你現在卡住的事，
半年後回頭看，可能根本不算什麼。

先撐著，別急著下結論。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在覺得一切都卡住的人——現在不順，不等於一輩子不順，只是這段路比較難走
variations: 短版：我們只是現在不順，又不是一輩子都這樣
進階版：你現在卡住的事，半年後回頭看，可能根本不算什麼

en.content:
A line from 'Doctor Slump' you'll want on a rough day:

"It's okay.
We're just not doing well right now —
not forever.
Chin up.
Good things are coming soon."

When you're at the bottom,
it's so easy to mistake
'for now' for 'always.'

But a low patch isn't failure.
It just means
you're walking a harder stretch of road.

Roads bend.
Seasons turn.
The thing that has you stuck today
might mean nothing
when you look back in six months.

Hold on. Don't rush to conclusions.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who feels like everything is stuck — being in a slump isn't failing, it's just a harder stretch of the same road
variations: Short: we're just not doing well right now — not forever
Advanced: what has you stuck today might mean nothing six months from now

items.sourceNote: 《今生也請多指教》金句「大家都是裝出來的」延伸，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
韓劇這句，第一次聽有點崩潰，後來變成安慰：

「人到死都不會真的懂事，
大家都只是裝出來的。」

你以為的大人，
那些看起來什麼都懂、什麼都穩的人，
其實也都在邊做邊慌。

沒有人是真的準備好才長大的，
都是被推上去，
硬著頭皮把角色演下去。

所以你不用因為「還沒搞懂人生」而自責。
你身邊那些看起來很懂的人，
也都在裝。

大家一起裝，就叫做長大。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個老覺得自己「還不夠成熟」的朋友——看起來很懂的大人，其實也都在邊做邊裝
variations: 短版：人到死都不會真的懂事，大家都是裝出來的
進階版：沒有人是準備好才長大的，都是被推上去硬演下去

en.content:
A K-drama line that stings at first, then becomes a comfort:

"No one ever truly grows up.
Everyone's just pretending."

Those grown-ups you look up to —
the ones who seem to have it all figured out,
all composed —
they're winging it and quietly panicking too.

Nobody got fully ready
before adulthood arrived.
They were all pushed onto the stage
and made to play the part anyway.

So don't beat yourself up
for 'not having life figured out.'
The people who look like they do?
They're pretending too.

Everyone pretending together — that's what we call growing up.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who always feels 'not grown-up enough' — the adults who look like they've got it together are improvising too
variations: Short: no one ever truly grows up — everyone's just pretending
Advanced: nobody got ready before adulthood; they were pushed on stage and made to play the part

items.sourceNote: 2026療癒韓劇「家裡有人等你愛你」金句延伸，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
2026療癒韓劇這句，下班路上特別有感：

「不管在外面受了多少委屈，
只要想到家裡還有人等你、愛你，
好像就又有力氣
面對明天了。」

外面的世界不會對你溫柔，
會有臉色、會有委屈、
會有你怎麼努力都不被看見的時候。

但只要有一個地方，
你一推開門，
有人會抬頭看你、叫你的名字，
問你今天還好嗎——

那一刻你就知道，
白天那些難，都撐得過去。

家不是房子，是有人在等你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給在外面打拚、常常一個人硬撐的人——撐住你的，從來不是房子，是有人在家等你
variations: 短版：只要想到家裡還有人等你愛你，好像就又有力氣面對明天
進階版：家不是房子，是你推開門，有人會抬頭叫你的名字

en.content:
A healing K-drama line that lands hardest on the commute home:

"No matter how much
the world wears you down out there,
just remembering
someone's home waiting, loving you,
somehow gives you the strength
to face tomorrow."

The world won't be gentle with you.
There'll be cold looks, swallowed hurt,
days you try your hardest
and still go unseen.

But if there's one place
where, the moment you open the door,
someone looks up, says your name,
and asks if you're okay —

that's when you know
you can survive all of it.

Home isn't a building. It's someone waiting for you.
en.editorNote: Send to someone grinding out there, holding it together alone — what carries you isn't the building, it's someone waiting inside it
variations: Short: just knowing someone's home waiting and loving you gives you strength for tomorrow
Advanced: home isn't a building — it's someone who looks up and says your name when you walk in

items.sourceNote: 韓劇愛情金句「治癒不是抹去痛，是給你再愛的力氣」延伸，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
韓劇這句，給剛走出一段感情的人：

「治癒，
不是把那些痛全部抹掉，
是讓你有力氣，
再去愛一次。」

很多人以為療傷
就是要徹底忘記，
忘到提起來都沒感覺。

但其實不用。
那段痛可以一直在，
它只是慢慢變成你的一部分，
不再痛得讓你動不了。

你不需要假裝沒受過傷，
你只需要，
哪天再遇到一個對的人時，
還有勇氣把手伸出去。

那就是你已經好了的證明。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在走出一段感情、卻怪自己「還沒放下」的人——治癒不是忘記，是你還願意再愛一次
variations: 短版：治癒不是抹去痛，是讓你有力氣再愛一次
進階版：你不用假裝沒受過傷，只要再遇到對的人時，還敢把手伸出去

en.content:
A K-drama line for anyone just out of a relationship:

"Healing
isn't erasing all the pain.
It's having the strength
to love again."

A lot of people think mending
means forgetting completely —
forgetting until it stirs nothing at all.

But you don't have to.
The ache is allowed to stay.
It just slowly becomes
part of you —
no longer the kind that freezes you in place.

You don't need to pretend
you were never hurt.
You only need,
when the right person comes along someday,
the courage to reach out anyway.

That's the proof you've healed.
en.editorNote: Send to someone moving on from a breakup but blaming themselves for 'not being over it' — healing isn't forgetting, it's being willing to love again
variations: Short: healing isn't erasing the pain — it's the strength to love again
Advanced: you don't have to pretend you were never hurt — you just need the courage to reach out when the right person comes
